response: The April marketing campaign generated **45K impressions, 2.3K clicks (5.1% CTR), and 187 signups (8.1% conversion) at a cost of $12K**, with a **customer acquisition cost (CAC) of $64 per signup**, showing improved CTR but lower conversion versus March. **Action item:** The team recommends **A/B testing the landing page call-to-action (CTA)** to boost conversions.
